flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Alabama State University are 24% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($34.5k vs $45.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alabama State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Alabama State University rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (10.1% → 14.7%).
